body.title: DickSimnel: write structured summary to ticket at escalation
body.result: structured escalation summary written to ticket body via append-note; What was tried / Where it broke / What now?
body.intention: I intend that when DickSimnel escalates a ticket, the ticket body contains a structured summary (what was tried, where it broke) so CC starts informed rather than cold.
body.description:
Currently DickSimnel escalation does setstatus escalated and nothing else — ticket body is silent on what was attempted. CC re-derives context from scratch.

Add a structured summary to the ticket body at escalation time with three fields: What was tried, Where it broke, What now? (for next tier).

**Affected files:** devices/dicksimnel/device.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; log every interface crossing (escalation is a lifecycle event — INFO)
**Scope boundary:** Only _escalate_ticket() in DickSimnel device. Does not change inference device or ticket schema.
**Completion criteria:** After escalation, cc_queue.py show <id> shows an Escalation summary section in description with three fields populated. Verified by test in tests/inference/test_dicksimnel.py.
